1.content:
# 🧪 AI Chatbot - Flag Impact

**Hybrid view:** correlates DevCycle chaos flag values (emitted as `feature_flag.evaluation` span events) with backend SLIs on the same span. Every chart splits the SLI by the live flag value, so the effect of a rollout is visible immediately.

2.title: Chat requests
2.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "POST /api/chat"
| summarize requests = count()

3.title: Chat failures
3.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "POST /api/chat"
| summarize failures = countIf(request.is_failed == true)

4.title: LLM calls
4.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "ChatNVIDIA.chat"
| summarize llm_calls = count()

5.title: Active chaos flags (last 5m)
5.query:
fetch spans, from:now()-5m
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| fieldsAdd flag_key = span.events[`feature_flag.key`],
            flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`]
| filter flag_value != "0.0" and flag_value != "false"
| summarize active_chaos_flags = countDistinct(flag_key)

6.content:
## 🗺 Chaos Flag State Map

One row per chaos flag, one column per 5-minute bucket. Cells are **1 (chaos active)** when the resolved value is non-default (anything other than `0.0` / `false`), else **0**. Read horizontally to see each flag's rollout history; read vertically to spot times when multiple flags were live simultaneously.

7.title: Chaos active by flag, over time
7.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| fieldsAdd flag_key = span.events[`feature_flag.key`],
            flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`],
            evt_ts = span.events[`timestamp`]
| fieldsAdd is_chaos = flag_value != "0.0" and flag_value != "false"
| summarize chaos_value = takeAny(if(is_chaos, flag_value)),
            default_value = takeAny(flag_value),
    by:{ bucket_ts = bin(evt_ts, 5m), flag_key }
| filterOut isNull(bucket_ts)
| sort bucket_ts asc
| fieldsAdd flag_value = coalesce(chaos_value, default_value),
            time_bucket = formatTimestamp(bucket_ts, format: "MMM dd HH:mm")
| fieldsAdd state = if(flag_value != "0.0" and flag_value != "false", "chaos", else: "default")
| fields time_bucket, flag_key, flag_value, state

10.content:
## ⏱ Flag Impact — Backend Latency

Backend p95 of `POST /api/chat` split by the live value of each delay-injecting flag. A non-`0.0` series rising above the `0.0` baseline is the rollout's latency cost.

11.title: p95 latency by chaos-random-delay-max-ms
11.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "POST /api/chat"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| filter span.events[`feature_flag.key`] == "chaos-random-delay-max-ms"
| makeTimeseries p95 = percentile(duration, 95),
    by:{ flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`] }

12.title: p95 latency by chaos-fixed-delay-ms
12.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "POST /api/chat"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| filter span.events[`feature_flag.key`] == "chaos-fixed-delay-ms"
| makeTimeseries p95 = percentile(duration, 95),
    by:{ flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`] }

20.content:
## 💥 Flag Impact — Errors

Failure count on `POST /api/chat` split by the live value of each error-injecting flag. A non-default series above zero is the rollout's error cost.

21.title: Failures by chaos-http-500-rate
21.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "POST /api/chat"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| filter span.events[`feature_flag.key`] == "chaos-http-500-rate"
| makeTimeseries failures = countIf(request.is_failed == true),
    by:{ flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`] }

22.title: Failures by chaos-http-503-rate
22.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter span.name == "POST /api/chat"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| filter span.events[`feature_flag.key`] == "chaos-http-503-rate"
| makeTimeseries failures = countIf(request.is_failed == true),
    by:{ flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`] }

30.content:
## 🕒 Flag Change Timeline

When each `(flag, value)` pair was first and last observed, with the evaluation count. Use this to align rollout windows with latency / error charts above.

31.title: Recent flag values
31.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| fieldsAdd flag_key = span.events[`feature_flag.key`],
            flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`],
            evt_ts = span.events[`timestamp`]
| summarize first_seen = min(evt_ts),
            last_seen = max(evt_ts),
            evaluations = count(),
    by:{ flag_key, flag_value }
| sort last_seen desc
| limit 50

32.title: Evaluations per (flag, value)
32.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| expand span.events
| filter span.events[`span_event.name`] == "feature_flag.evaluation"
| fieldsAdd flag_key = span.events[`feature_flag.key`],
            flag_value = span.events[`feature_flag.result.value`]
| filter flag_value != "0.0" and flag_value != "false"
| summarize evaluations = count(), by:{ flag_key, flag_value }
| sort evaluations desc
| limit 30

annotations.input:
fetch events, from:now()-7d
| filter dt.entity.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter isNotNull(chaos.preset)
| filter chaos.state == "active"
| parse event.name, "'Chaos Engineering: ' LD:preset"
annotations.name: Chaos Engineering Enabled

annotations.input:
fetch events, from:now()-7d
| filter dt.entity.service.name == "nvidia-chatbot"
| filter isNotNull(chaos.preset)
| filter chaos.state == "inactive"
| parse event.name, "'Chaos Engineering: ' LD:preset"
annotations.name: Chaos Engineering Disabled
